raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Higher education should be accessible to every student who wants to further their education and skills.",
    "Investing in students and the workforce is critically important during times of budget shortfall.",
    "True equity and shared economic prosperity can be achieved by investing in individuals working to improve their lives.",
    "Cal Grant reforms are essential for success in future budget years.",
    "Current higher education systems leave out tens of thousands of low-income students, particularly those who are Latino, African-American, or returning adult learners.",
    "Generous investments have expanded opportunities for students who qualify, but many still remain excluded.",
    "Consistent, affordable access to higher education opportunities is crucial for building a more just economy."
  ]
}
```
